entity.label: Zechariah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One who assisted in teaching the law to the people in the time of Jehoshaphat (2 Chr. 17:7).

nodes.label: Zechariah
nodes.description: One who assisted in teaching the law to the people in the time of Jehoshaphat (2 Chr. 17:7).

verses.text: Also in the third year of his reign he sent to his princes, even to Benhail, and to Obadiah, and to Zechariah, and to Nethaneel, and to Michaiah, to teach in the cities of Judah.
